name: Peanut Butter Dip
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons frozen orange juice concentrate, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, combine the peanut butter and thawed orange juice.
2. Beat the mixture until it is fluffy.
3. Stir in the plain yogurt until the mixture is smooth.
4. Cover the bowl and chill the dip.
5. Serve with assorted fruit.
6. This recipe makes 1 1/2 cups of dip or 24 servings of 1 tablespoon each.
